title: Check if there exists a subsequence with sum K

content.problemStatement: Given an array nums and an integer k. Return true if there exist subsequences such that the sum of all elements in subsequences is equal to k else false.
content.inputFormat: The input will contain an array of integers and a target sum. The array will be given as a space-separated list of integers, and the target sum will be given as a single integer.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean value indicating whether a subsequence with the given sum exists.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Recursive approach to check all possible subsequences
